list.title: eCommerce close accelerated from 10 days to 3
list.summary: Consolidated multi-channel sales, automated reconciliations, and standardized reporting to reduce month-end close time.
list.problem: Client struggled with disjointed sales channels, slow reconciliations, and delayed management reporting.
list.approach: Mapped data flows, cleaned historical transactions, standardized chart of accounts, integrated sales channels with accounting software, and implemented monthly close checklist.
results: Close time reduced from 10 days to 3
Monthly KPI dashboard delivered on day 4

list.title: SaaS FP&A dashboards for board reporting
list.summary: Delivered ARR/MRR, churn, CAC/LTV dashboards and cash runway forecasting for a Seed-stage company.
list.problem: Board lacked timely and consistent metrics; finance model was ad-hoc and fragile.
list.approach: Built a single-source-of-truth model, standardized revenue recognition, and automated weekly data refresh.
